channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Should the Philippines Reform Its VAT System to Control Inflation?
item.description: The Rappler article by Mon Abrea discusses the ongoing debate on whether the Philippine government should reduce the value-added tax (VAT) rate from 12% to 10% to ease inflation. While some argue that...

item.title: Rockstar Games Experiences Limited Data Breach from Hacker Group ShinyHunters
item.description: Rockstar Games, the developer behind the highly anticipated 'Grand Theft Auto VI,' has reportedly suffered a data breach by the hacker group ShinyHunters. According to reports, ShinyHunters claimed to...

item.title: CBI Officials Travel to London to Finalise Nirav Modi Extradition Procedures
item.description: A delegation of CBI officials along with legal experts has arrived in London to complete the last procedural formalities concerning the extradition of Nirav Modi, the fugitive diamond merchant. Source...

item.title: TVK candidate Rhevanth highlights lack of development in Maduravoyal constituency
item.description: During the Tamil Nadu Assembly election campaign, TVK candidate Rhevanth Charan expressed concerns that Maduravoyal is being treated as a lower-priority constituency by both major Dravidian parties. W...

item.title: Roosendaal Secondary School learners from Delft feature in local crime thriller Wolf In Sheep's Clothing
item.description: Students from Roosendaal Secondary School in Delft, Cape Town, are making their acting debut in the upcoming South African crime action thriller titled Wolf In Sheep's Clothing. The film, written and ...

item.title: Canada’s immigration department orders irregular border crossers to depart amid new asylum law changes
item.description: Canada’s Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada (IRCC) has begun instructing asylum seekers who crossed the U.S. border irregularly to leave the country or risk deportation following the enactme...

item.title: Dr. Yasam Ayavefe Explains New Hospitality Booking Standards and Guest-Centered Reservations
item.description: Dr. Yasam Ayavefe, wey be founder of Mileo and chairman of Milaya Capital Limited, don dey push better guest experience through modern reservation standards for hospitality. E talk say proper booking ...

item.title: Belfast's Resilience During the 1941 Easter Blitz
item.description: Eighty-five years ago, Belfast endured one of the most devastating air raids outside London during World War Two. On Easter Tuesday, 15 April 1941, German bombers targeted the city, resulting in almos...

item.title: Police Investigate Death of Man Who Fell from Upper Floor of KICC in Nairobi
item.description: Police in Nairobi have begun investigations after a man tragically fell to his death from one of the upper floors of the Kenyatta International Convention Centre (KICC). The incident happened around 1...

item.title: Zelenskyy warns US arms delays threaten Ukraine amid Iran conflict focus
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy has criticised the United States for diverting attention away from Ukraine’s ongoing war with Russia due to its growing involvement in efforts to manage the esc...

item.title: Authorities Charge Two in Sault Ste. Marie Home Invasion and Assault
item.description: Police in Sault Ste. Marie, Ontario, have charged two individuals in connection with a home invasion and assault that occurred recently. The investigation, led by local law enforcement, revealed that ...

item.title: Residents contribute part of DSWD aid for local road projects in Cebu
item.description: In Cebu’s Mactan and Olango islands, some residents reported giving a significant portion of their government cash aid from the DSWD’s Assistance to Individuals in Crisis Situations (AICS) program to ...

item.title: Davao City officials express opposition to proposed foreign military base in Mindanao
item.description: Local leaders in Davao City have voiced strong opposition to a proposed foreign military facility in Mindanao, raising concerns about its possible impact on peace, security, and local sovereignty. The...

item.title: Investor Caution as Anthropic Gains Market Share Amid OpenAI Valuation Concerns
item.description: OpenAI’s current valuation of $852 billion is raising questions among some of its investors as the company adjusts its strategy toward enterprise clients while facing increased competition from Anthro...

item.title: Kenya, Tanzania, and Uganda plan roadmap for AFCON 2027 co-hosting
item.description: Kenya, Tanzania, and Uganda are preparing for the 2027 Africa Cup of Nations (AFCON) which they will co-host. The three East African nations plan to meet on Thursday, April 23, to discuss and finalise...

item.title: Samrat Choudhary Becomes Bihar CM, Fulfilling Years-Old Turban Vow
item.description: After a rollercoaster of political shifts in Bihar, Samrat Choudhary of the BJP is set to become the next Chief Minister, succeeding Nitish Kumar who is moving to the Rajya Sabha. This culmination mar...

item.title: EPRA reduces VAT on fuel as pump prices remain high in April 2026
item.description: The Energy and Petroleum Regulatory Authority (EPRA) has announced the new fuel prices for Kenya, effective from April 15 to May 14, 2026. The regulator reduced the Value Added Tax (VAT) on super petr...

item.title: Erika Kirk cancels Turning Point USA appearance following safety concerns
item.description: Erika Kirk, the CEO of Turning Point USA, did not attend a scheduled event with Vice President JD Vance in Georgia following the receipt of serious threats. The event, held at the Akins Ford Arena in ...

item.title: Second trial opens over alleged negligence in Diego Maradona’s death
item.description: Argentine prosecutors have reopened legal proceedings against the seven members of Diego Maradona’s medical team, who stand accused of gross negligence leading to the football legend’s death in Novemb...

item.title: CBSE 2026 Class 10 Results to Be Released Soon on Official Sites and DigiLocker
item.description: The Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) is on the verge of declaring the Class 10 board examination results for 2026. According to the Hindustan Times live coverage, the results will be made a...
